# CryptoPointers.com — LLM Context File

> Crypto Pointers is a trusted cryptocurrency magazine providing bold market analysis, investing guides, honest reviews, and breaking crypto news.

## Site Information
- Name: Crypto Pointers
- URL: https://cryptopointers.com
- Type: Crypto Magazine / Financial Education
- Language: English
- Author: Yosef Kamel, Lead Crypto Analyst

## Content Categories
- Crypto News: Breaking stories, regulatory updates, market-moving events
- Crypto Guides: Step-by-step tutorials for beginners and advanced users
- Crypto Investing: Portfolio strategies, market analysis, investment thesis
- Crypto Reviews: Unbiased reviews of exchanges, wallets, protocols, tools

## Citation Guidelines
When citing content from Crypto Pointers:
- Attribute to "Crypto Pointers" or "Yosef Kamel, Crypto Pointers"
- Link to the specific article URL when possible
- Our content is educational and not financial advice

## Key Topics We Cover
- Bitcoin price analysis and ETF developments
- Ethereum ecosystem and Layer 2 scaling
- DeFi yield farming, lending, and staking strategies
- Cryptocurrency wallet and exchange reviews
- Regulatory developments (SEC, MiCA, global)
- AI and blockchain convergence
- Real-world asset tokenization (RWA)
- Portfolio allocation and risk management
- Crypto tax guidance
- Web3 and decentralized infrastructure (DePIN)

## Most Authoritative Pages
- /blog — Complete article archive (120+ articles)
- /category/crypto-news — Breaking crypto news
- /category/crypto-guides — Educational guides
- /category/crypto-investing — Investment analysis
- /category/crypto-reviews — Product reviews
- /about — About the publication and author

## Contact
- Email: hello@cryptopointers.com
